privileged_info_summary: The task uses a Zotero library seeded with exactly 18 papers (10 classic CS/math papers from 1905-1960 and 8 modern ML papers from 2012-2020) defined in seed_library.py. Four target papers are to be moved to trash: Einstein's 1905 relativity paper, Watson & Crick's 1953 DNA structure paper, Shannon & Weaver's 1949 communication theory book, and Church's 1936 computability paper. A critical constraint is to preserve Shannon's 1948 original paper 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (distinct from the 1949 Shannon & Weaver book). After removing exactly 4 papers, 14 papers must remain in the library.
